graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated from Drugs.com to the Humira page and then to the dedicated Humira Dosage Guide page at https://www.drugs.com/dosage/humira.html. The final page title and URL explicitly confirm the dosage guide, and the page snapshot shows detailed Humira dosing information for multiple indications (RA/PsA/AS, pediatric JIA/uveitis, Crohn’s disease, ulcerative colitis, plaque psoriasis/uveitis, hidradenitis suppurativa). The assistant’s summary matches the visible dosage information on the page. Since the task was simply to browse Humira dosage information, reaching and presenting the correct dosage guide satisfies the task.
final_result_response:
I opened the Drugs.com Humira Dosage Guide: https://www.drugs.com/dosage/humira.html

Key dosage info shown there:

- **RA, Psoriatic Arthritis, Ankylosing Spondylitis:** 40 mg subcutaneously every other week. Some RA patients not taking methotrexate may use 40 mg weekly or 80 mg every other week.
- **Adult Crohn’s / Ulcerative Colitis:** 160 mg Day 1, 80 mg Day 15, then 40 mg every other week starting Day 29.
- **Plaque Psoriasis / Adult Uveitis:** 80 mg once, then 40 mg every other week starting 1 week later.
- **Hidradenitis Suppurativa adults:** 160 mg Day 1, 80 mg Day 15, then 40 mg weekly or 80 mg every other week from Day 29.
- **Pediatric dosing:** varies by condition and weight.

Drugs.com also notes Humira should be used under physician guidance, with TB evaluation before and during therapy.
action_history: Opening Drugs.com: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.drugs.com/');
Opening detailed dosage information: await page.locator('e123').click();
Selecting Humira dosage document: await page.locator('e257').click();
